parameters.query: SELECT * FROM health_checks WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 7;
SELECT * FROM email_inbox WHERE received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND (board_relevant = true OR priority IN ('urgent', 'high')) ORDER BY received_at DESC;
SELECT * FROM decisions WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;

parameters.value: Board meeting minutes stored in DB. Please review decisions.
